name: Dragon Knight of Creation
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>創</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>そう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>世</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>竜</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>騎</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>き</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>士</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>し</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Increase this card's Level by 4 during your opponent's turn only. When this card destroys an opponent's monster by battle and sends it to the GY: You can send 1 Level 7 or 8 Dragon monster from your Deck to the GY. You can send 1 card from your hand to the GY, then target 1 Level 7 or 8 Dragon monster in your GY; send this card to the GY, and if you do, Special Summon that monster. You can only use this effect of "Dragon Knight of Creation" once per turn.

You can send 1 card from your hand to the GY, then target 1 Level 7 or 8 Dragon monster in your GY; send this card to the GY, and if you do, Special Summon that monster. sets.set: Rise of the True Dragons Structure Deck

action: Activates if it destroys a monster by battle
Sends from your Deck to your Graveyard
Sends from hand to Graveyard for cost
